title: carduus hamulosus var. spinigerus
intro: Carduus hamulosus var. spinigerus, also known as Spiny Thistle, is a plant species in the dandelion family that is native to certain regions of Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Carduus hamulosus var. spinigerus lie in its ability to regulate menstrual cycles and alleviate symptoms associated with premenstrual syndrome, such as anxiety and bloating. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, making it a popular remedy for various gastrointestinal issues. Carduus hamulosus var. spinigerus can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing dried flowers and leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by combining the plant's extracts with a solvent.
